playground.title: Things I made because I couldn't leave the idea alone.

items.title: Scroll Typography Study
items.note: A motion sketch for mapping scroll progress to staggered editorial type without hiding the actual message.

items.title: Cursor Distortion Experiment
items.note: A pointer-led distortion study with a static touch fallback so the idea is still readable without a cursor.

items.title: Interactive Album Poster
items.note: A responsive poster prototype where track metadata, halftone overlays, and motion cues behave like interface material.

items.title: Modern Form ‍~ H&M Editorial
items.note: A contemporary fashion magazine combining expressive typography with high-contrast editorial photography.
items.imageAlt: High contrast editorial poster design with architectural geometry

items.title: Stellar Vortex
items.note: A geometric pattern study exploring repetition, optical depth, and radial movement.
items.imageAlt: Moody album cover direction with performer and dark stage lighting

items.title: Les Fleurs du Mal
items.note: An experimental exhibition poster inspired by Tehran, Persian typography, and urban visual culture.
